### 2020166
**Ben 10: Omniverse S01E79 - End of an Era**  
🆕 TV-Y7-FV 🔓 22:28  
⌛ April 20, 2027 at 23:59:59 EDT  
[Open in app](https://cnvideo.sercomkc.org/redirector.html?type=cnapp&seriesid=10000000000&titleid=2020166&mediaid=769950bf344e93b8218ae50fa750a67dea659b9d) or on the web: https://www.cartoonnetwork.com/video/ben-10-classic/end-of-an-era-episode.html
